requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 for PV Inverters — ZABS / ZESCO Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000——ZABS / ZESCO要求
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000——ZABS / ZESCO要求

summary.en: Zambia's PV inverter EMC requirements are anchored in IEC standards adopted through ZABS (Zambia Bureau of Standards) ZS standards and referenced in ZESCO grid-connection and ERB licensing technical conditions. Key EMC standards applicable to PV inverters in Zambia include: IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment), which is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment, and IEC 61000-3-2 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions for equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase). ZABS ZS standards align with IEC 61000-series requirements for general electrical equipment. For utility-scale and C&I solar projects, project specifications routinely reference IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 as mandatory evidence. Zambia's mining sector — a major driver of C&I solar — requires robust EMC compliance because inverters operate near sensitive mining control equipment.
summary.zh: 赞比亚光伏逆变器EMC要求以IEC标准为基础，通过ZABS（赞比亚标准局）ZS标准采纳，并在ZESCO并网和ERB许可技术条件中引用。适用于赞比亚光伏逆变器的主要EMC标准包括：IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法），为光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准；IEC 61000-3-2（电磁兼容——每相输入电流不超过16 A设备的谐波电流排放限值）。ZABS ZS标准与IEC 61000系列通用电气设备要求保持一致。大型和工商业太阳能项目规格通常将IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2作为强制证据引用。赞比亚矿业——工商业太阳能的主要驱动力——要求严格的EMC合规，因为逆变器在敏感矿业控制设备附近运行。
summary.zht: 尚比亞光伏逆變器EMC要求以IEC標準為基礎，通過ZABS（尚比亞標準局）ZS標準採納，並在ZESCO併網和ERB許可技術條件中引用。適用於尚比亞光伏逆變器的主要EMC標準包括：IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法），為光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準；IEC 61000-3-2（電磁相容——每相輸入電流不超過16 A設備的諧波電流排放限值）。ZABS ZS標準與IEC 61000系列通用電氣設備要求保持一致。大型和工商業太陽能項目規格通常將IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2作為強制證據引用。尚比亞礦業——工商業太陽能的主要驅動力——要求嚴格的EMC合規，因為逆變器在敏感礦業控制設備附近運行。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment (adopted in ZABS ZS framework; referenced in project specifications)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase)
IEC 61000-3-3 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker in public low-voltage supply systems
ZABS ZS standards — adopting IEC 61000-series EMC requirements for electrical equipment imported into Zambia

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic framework. GB/T 37408 EMC testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While IEC 62920 draws on IEC 61000-series test methods, the GB/T 37408 EMC test scope and referenced limits are not harmonised with IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for ZABS conformity assessment, ZESCO grid-connection project submissions, or ERB-licensed project specifications in Zambia.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，包含与中国国内框架相符的EMC测试要求。GB/T 37408 EMC测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管IEC 62920借鉴了IEC 61000系列测试方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC测试范围和引用限值未与IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2协调。仅基于GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不被赞比亚的ZABS合格评定、ZESCO并网项目提交或ERB许可项目规格接受为IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，包含與中國國內框架相符的EMC測試要求。GB/T 37408 EMC測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管IEC 62920借鑑了IEC 61000系列測試方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC測試範圍和引用限值未與IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2協調。僅基於GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不被尚比亞的ZABS合格評定、ZESCO併網項目提交或ERB許可項目規格接受為IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy Zambia's IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements for ZABS conformity assessment, ZESCO grid-connection, or project-level procurement specifications. Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model and power rating being supplied to Zambia; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report for the model. For mining sector C&I projects, confirm whether additional EMC requirements apply under project-specific procurement specifications. Where EMC test results were obtained under Chinese grid conditions (220/380 V), consider whether retesting under Zambia grid conditions (230/400 V, 50 Hz) is required by the ZESCO project engineer or project owner.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足赞比亚ZABS合格评定、ZESCO并网或项目级采购规格对IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2的要求。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、涵盖供应至赞比亚的特定逆变器型号和功率等级的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）该型号的IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告。矿业工商业项目须确认项目特定采购规格是否适用额外EMC要求。若EMC测试结果在中国电网条件（220/380 V）下获取，应与ZESCO项目工程师或项目业主确认是否需要在赞比亚电网条件（230/400 V、50 Hz）下重新测试。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足尚比亞ZABS合格評定、ZESCO併網或項目級採購規格對IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2的要求。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、涵蓋供應至尚比亞的特定逆變器型號和功率等級的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）該型號的IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告。礦業工商業項目須確認項目特定採購規格是否適用額外EMC要求。若EMC測試結果在中國電網條件（220/380 V）下取得，應與ZESCO項目工程師或項目業主確認是否需要在尚比亞電網條件（230/400 V、50 Hz）下重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for ZABS conformity assessment where IEC 62920 falls within regulated product scope; mandatory for utility-scale, C&I, and mining solar project procurement specifications; required as part of ZESCO grid-connection technical package
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 EMC testing is a requirement for voluntary CQC/CGC certification; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy Zambia's IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements for ZABS conformity assessment, ZESCO grid-connection, or project-level specifications. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model before project submission. Confirm whether Zambia grid voltage conditions (230/400 V) require retesting compared to test results obtained under Chinese 220/380 V conditions. Verify current ZABS conformity product scope at zabs.org.zm.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足赞比亚ZABS合格评定、ZESCO并网或项目级规格对IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2的要求。在项目提交前须从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。请确认赞比亚电网电压条件（230/400 V）是否需要相较于中国220/380 V条件下的测试结果重新测试。请在zabs.org.zm核实当前ZABS合格评定产品范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足尚比亞ZABS合格評定、ZESCO併網或項目級規格對IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2的要求。在項目提交前須從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。請確認尚比亞電網電壓條件（230/400 V）是否需要相較於中國220/380 V條件下的測試結果重新測試。請在zabs.org.zm核實當前ZABS合格評定產品範圍。
